name: canshare-urinary-male-genital-testicular-sact-topography
title: NZ cancer urinary and male genital testicular SACT topography
description: The body location used to describe the point of origin for testicular cancer or an 'Other' value, in the context of systemic anti-cancer therapy (SACT).
